## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what went wrong.

## Agent Involved
Which agent(s) exhibited the issue? (e.g., Planner, CoreImplementer-subagent, Orchestrator)

1. Invoked `@AgentName` with: "..."
2. ...
3. Observed: ...

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened instead.

## Eval Suite Result
```bash
cd evals && npm test
```
Did the eval suite pass? Paste the summary line (`Total: X | Passed: X | Failed: X`).

- VS Code version:
